_comment: Copy to cli/bookforge-cli.json (auto-loaded) or ~/.bookforge-cli.json, or point at it with --config. Explicit CLI flags always override these. Nothing here is required — it just saves typing.

defaults._comment: Fill any flag you leave off. Keys are flag names (dashed or underscored). Only fills flags that default to unset (voice, provider, model, output-dir, tier, simplify-mode, ...).

voices._comment: Aliases -> a registered voice id (string), OR an unregistered model {model_dir, token}. Lets you name things whatever you want.

engines._comment: type '--engine orpheus' and it looks up where orpheus lives. Fills --orpheus-install / --conda-env / --models-dir only where you didn't set them. Omit any key to inherit BookForge's own config.

model_aliases._comment: Short names for AI models: '--model sonnet' -> the full id.
